hero.sub: Claude, GPT, DeepSeek, Qwen — every major model through one key. Pay as you go, no subscription, at the fairest price. The best intelligence, within everyone's reach.
hero.trust: Relaying for 12,000+ developers · Works with native tools · 99.95% uptime

term.comment: # drives native tools · 原生工具直接驱动

tools.title: Works seamlessly with the native tools you already use

models.title: One endpoint. Every model.
models.sub: No juggling accounts or invoices. One interface, one bill, switch between models anytime.
models.claudeNote: Best for long context, code & reasoning

values.title: Lowering the bar to top models, for all.
values.v1d: A single API key for Claude, GPT, DeepSeek, Qwen and more. OpenAI-compatible — migrate with zero changes.
values.v2d: Token-level billing, shared pooling to split costs. The same models, at a lower unit price — pay only for what you use.
values.v3d: Drives Claude Code, Codex, Cursor and other native tools directly — not a single line of code to change.
values.v4d: Multi-account load balancing, sticky sessions and concurrency control. 99.95% uptime, no dropped requests.

manifesto.quote: The best intelligence shouldn't belong to the few.
manifesto.body: The price and barriers of frontier models are keeping too many people out. LLMRELAY pools scattered subscription quotas and distributes them fairly — so a student, a solo developer, or a small team can use the very same models as the largest companies. That is model equality.

pricing.title: Pay as you go. No tricks.
pricing.sub: Top up and start instantly. Balance never expires. Billed by token in real time.

ctaband.title: Put top models in everyone's hands — today.
ctaband.sub: Sign up in a minute. Free credit, no credit card.

footer.tagline: Model equality — frontier intelligence, within everyone's reach.
footer.copy: © 2026 LLMRELAY. An open model relay platform.
